---
title: "Home"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
---


![](http://profile.xjtlu.edu.cn/upload/ZZXy8uNxGWTAWatwd3zi.jpg){width=30%}


I am a Assistant Professor at Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University, I received the Ph.D. in Mathematics under Prof. Balakrishnan's supervison at McMaster University, Ontario, Canada in 2021. My research interests include Statistics, Reliability and Infectious Disease Dynamics.


$~$




$~$

|Contact Information:                                                              |
|:--------------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| MB530                                       | Tel: +86 (0512)8897 3043           |
| Department of Foundational Mathematics      |                                    |
| Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University         | Email: mu.he@xjtlu.edu.cn          |
| Suzhou, JiangSu, China                      |                                    |

$~$

![](https://www.xjtlu.edu.cn/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/campus-blossom-2.1f5be76d.jpg){width=60%}
